# all

**Type Property**

All memory pressure events.

## Declaration

```swift
static let all: DispatchSource.MemoryPressureEvent
```

## Memory Pressure Event Flags

- **normal**: An event indicating that the system memory pressure condition changed to normal.
- **warning**: An event indicating that the system memory pressure condition changed to warning.
- **critical**: An event indicating that the system memory pressure condition changed to critical.

items.description: An event indicating that the system memory pressure condition changed to normal.
items.name: normal

items.description: An event indicating that the system memory pressure condition changed to warning.
items.name: warning

items.description: An event indicating that the system memory pressure condition changed to critical.
items.name: critical
